name: empty-icon
visual_summary: The Empty Icon component is a small, customizable icon with a placeholder shape and no visual content. It is often used in situations where an actual image or icon is not yet available or when a simple 'coming soon' indicator is needed. The component can be styled to match various design themes and can be used in navigation bars, dashboards, or anywhere an empty icon is required.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready badge component with the following characteristics:

Name: empty-icon
Description: The Empty Icon component is a small, customizable icon with a placeholder shape and no visual content. It is often used in situations where an actual image or icon is not yet available or when a simple 'coming soon' indicator is needed. The component can be styled to match various design themes and can be used in navigation bars, dashboards, or anywhere an empty icon is required.
Style: square, circle, icon-only
Interactions: hover
Tags: empty-space, placeholder, icon, nav, dashboard

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
